name: Maggies Coca-Cola Basted Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ham fat side down in a shallow baking pan.
2. Pour Coca-cola into the pan until it covers the bottom of the pan by 1/2-inch.
3. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
4. Bake for 2 to 3 hours, or until the internal temperature reaches 140 degrees F (as measured with a meat thermometer), basting every 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Remove ham from the pan and let cool.
6. Cut away the rind and excess fat with a sharp knife.
7. In a bowl, combine the brown sugar, dry mustard, prepared mustard, and enough Coca-cola to form a thick paste.
8. Place the ham on a roasting rack in the pan and brush it evenly with the paste.
9. Pour any remaining Coca-cola into the bottom of the pan.
10. Increase the oven temperature to 375 degrees F.
11. Bake for an additional 45 minutes, basting every 20-15 minutes until the sugar-mustard glaze has melted to a dark coating.
12. Let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before slicing.
